notes: Two-leg XNG/XAU natural-gas/gold return-spread reversion basket from the approved CME-GAS-GOLD-RELVAL-2026 source packet. The EA runs from the XNGUSD.DWX host setfile and reads both D1 close series to compute a fixed-window natural-gas-minus-gold return spread. Q02 must evaluate the logical basket, not standalone legs.
